items.title: # Giving an LLM Eyes and Hands on a Mobile Simulator
items.description:
The interface a human uses

When a person does QA in tapflow, the loop is:

  1. Look at the simulator screen
  2. Decide what to do (tap, swipe, type)
  3. Do it
  4. Look again

This is exactly the perception-action loop that vision-capable LLMs are bui

items.title: "The AI did it" won't save you when EU regulators come knocking
items.description:
